description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses a before_script to set the npm auth token from ${NPM_TOKEN} and install dependencies. Define three jobs named build:node:10.8.0, build:node:6.10.3, and build:node:8.11.4, each using the respective node Docker images (node:10.8.0, node:6.10.3, node:8.11.4) and running the shared script that executes npm run test. All jobs run in the default stage and inherit the before_script. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
